name: TQQQ 60% Annual Rebalance
description: Holds a static 60% allocation to TQQQ, rebalancing once per year on the first trading day of each year to correct drift. Serves as a leveraged baseline — no signal logic, just a constant leveraged Nasdaq position.
overfit_notes: Single parameter: 60% allocation. The round number is a deliberate design choice, not a swept value. Minimal overfit risk.

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Annual — first trading day of each year, resets to 60%

rules.label: No signal
rules.text: No entry/exit logic; pure static allocation

name: QQQ RSI(2) Dip → Equal-Weight TQQQ/SOXL/TECL
description: Enters an equal-weight basket of TQQQ, SOXL, and TECL (3× leveraged tech) when QQQ's 2-period Wilder RSI drops below 20, capturing short-term oversold bounces in leveraged Nasdaq. Exits fully when RSI recovers above 20.
overfit_notes: Two parameters: RSI period 2 and threshold 20. Both are canonical for ultra-short mean reversion. The three-name basket is a deliberate diversification, not a swept choice.

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: QQQ RSI(2, Wilder) < 20: 33% TQQQ + 33% SOXL + 33% TECL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / SOXL / TECL

name: TQQQ Dynamic Sizing: SMA200 + RSI Tiers
description: Three-tier TQQQ sizing gated by the 200-day SMA. Above SMA: 100% on RSI(2) < 30 dip, 50% default, 20% on RSI(10) overbought > 80. Below SMA: cash. Adapts position size to both trend regime and short-term momentum state.
overfit_notes: Five parameters: SMA 200, RSI2 period/threshold, RSI10 period/threshold, three allocation levels (100/50/20%). The allocation tiers feel calibrated; the combination of two RSI indicators on the same asset adds fitting risk.

rules.label: Default
rules.text: 50% TQQQ when in regime with no RSI signal

name: TQQQ Expanding Range Breakout + ATR Trailing Stop
description: Enters TQQQ when QQQ is in an uptrend (above SMA 200), the previous day's bar range expanded vs. the bar before it, and ADX(10) > 25 confirming trend strength. Manages the trade with a 3×ATR(14) Wilder trailing stop and exits at the 20-day high or on QQQ falling below SMA.
overfit_notes: Five parameters: SMA 200, ADX 10/threshold 25, ATR 14/multiplier 3, 20-day exit high. The combination of range expansion + ADX is somewhat fitted; the ATR multiplier 3 is standard.

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: QQQ > SMA(200) AND prior bar range > bar-before range AND ADX(10) > 25: 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Trailing stop
rules.text: Price − 3 × ATR(14, Wilder); ratchets up, never down

name: QQQ SMA(150) Trend → TQQQ
description: Holds 100% TQQQ when QQQ is above its 150-day SMA, otherwise moves to cash. A slight variant of the standard 200-day trend rule — uses 150 days for a faster regime signal on the underlying index.
overfit_notes: Single parameter: SMA 150. Slightly shorter than the canonical 200 but still a widely-used period. The period choice could be a minor fit to history.

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: TQQQ IBS Extreme + ATR Stop
description: Buys TQQQ when the Internal Bar Strength (IBS = (close−low)/(high−low)) is below 0.1, signaling a close near the day's low (capitulation). Exits when IBS exceeds 0.9 (close near day's high) or price falls below entry minus 3×ATR(14).
overfit_notes: Three parameters: IBS entry 0.1, IBS exit 0.9, ATR multiplier 3. IBS thresholds 0.1/0.9 are at the extreme ends of [0,1] and are standard for this type of reversal strategy. ATR multiplier 3 is conventional.

rules.label: Stop loss
rules.text: Close < entry price − 3 × ATR(14, Wilder): liquidate

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 45 min after market open (previous day's completed bar)

name: CMO(20) Momentum
description: Holds TQQQ when the 20-day Chande Momentum Oscillator on QQQ is positive (net up-moves exceed net down-moves) and switches to BIL otherwise. Only trades on regime change.
overfit_notes: Single momentum indicator at a standard period (20) with a zero-line threshold — minimal tuning.

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: ROC(20) Zero Cross
description: Holds TQQQ when QQQ's 20-day rate of change is positive (today's close above close 20 days ago) and switches to BIL otherwise. Only trades on regime change.
overfit_notes: Single momentum indicator at a standard period (20) with a zero-line threshold — minimal tuning.

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: Up-Day Count(20)
description: Holds TQQQ when more than half of the last 20 trading sessions closed higher than the previous day, and switches to BIL when down-days dominate. Only trades on regime change.
overfit_notes: Single breadth metric at a common lookback (20 days) with a natural majority threshold — minimal tuning.

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Up-day count in last 20 sessions > 10: 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: TII(20) Trend Intensity
description: Holds TQQQ when more than half of the last 20 daily closes are above the 20-day SMA, indicating sustained trend participation, and switches to BIL otherwise. Only trades on regime change.
overfit_notes: Single indicator (TII, n=20) with canonical 50% threshold — minimal tuning.

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: Price 126D Percentile
description: Holds TQQQ when QQQ's current price is in the upper half of its 126-day (6-month) high-low range and switches to BIL otherwise. Only trades on regime change.
overfit_notes: Single price-position metric at a sensible lookback (126 days) with a natural midpoint threshold — minimal tuning.

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: Trend Stretch Exit
description: Trend following with mean-reversion "stretch" thresholds for exits.

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: QQQ > SMA(200) AND stretch = (price - SMA)/SMA < 5% → 100% TQQQ

name: TQQQ Anti-Martingale Pyramid
description: Starts at 50% TQQQ when QQQ > SMA(200). For every 5% gain above the entry price, adds another 15% allocation until reaching 100%. Implements the 'let winners run / cut losers' principle — pyramiding into strength.
overfit_notes: Anti-Martingale is a textbook position-sizing scheme; tuned step (5% gain → +15% size).

rules.label: Pyramid
rules.text: Each 5% gain above entry → +15% allocation, capped at 100%

name: Donchian-200 Midline
description: A trend follower using the midpoint of the 200-day Donchian channel (average of the 200-day high and 200-day low) as a dynamic trend filter. When QQQ price is above this midline it holds TQQQ; below it holds BIL.
overfit_notes: Single Donchian midline at 200 days — a textbook period applied to the midpoint instead of the breakout levels. Very low overfit.

name: ROC+D200 + 7% Trail Exit
description: Enters TQQQ when both ROC(20) and Donchian-200 are bullish, with a trailing drawdown exit: closes if QQQ falls more than 7% below its 20-day high, even if the longer-term trend signal remains intact.
overfit_notes: Standard ROC(20)>0 and Donchian-200 entry conditions. The 7% trailing drawdown from 20-day high is a non-canonical threshold — the specific percentage is tuned.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: ROC(20)>0 on QQQ AND QQQ > Donchian-200 midline

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Both conditions true AND QQQ within 7% of 20-day high → 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: Trend signal turns off OR QQQ drops >7% below 20-day high → 100% BIL

rules.label: Stop-loss
rules.text: Trailing: exit if QQQ falls >7% from its 20-day high

name: TQQQ Pyramid (10%/day)
description: A pyramiding trend follower that gradually scales into TQQQ by adding 10% exposure per day while both ROC(20) and Donchian-200 remain bullish, reaching 100% after ten consecutive bull days. Exits entirely to BIL on the first bear signal.
overfit_notes: Key tuned parameter: the 10% daily increment rate (requiring 10 consecutive bull days for full exposure). Also uses standard ROC(20)>0 and Donchian-200. The pyramid step rate is non-canonical.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: ROC(20)>0 on QQQ AND QQQ > Donchian-200 midline

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Bull: +10% TQQQ per day (up to 100%); remainder in BIL

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: Bear signal → TQQQ to 0%, 100% BIL immediately

name: Range Expanded 110%
description: A volatility-expansion trend follower that enters TQQQ when QQQ's recent 25-day average range exceeds 110% of the 200-day average, indicating elevated volatility, combined with a median trend gate.
overfit_notes: The 110% threshold inverts the compression logic; it is one step in a family of threshold sweeps. Elevated volatility entry is a non-standard signal direction. Moderate tuning.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ close > median of last 200 daily closes

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: Avg daily range (last 25 days) > 110% of avg daily range (last 200 days)

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: One condition true → 50% TQQQ / 50% BIL; neither true → 100% BIL

name: MFI14_Hyst
description: Applies a 14-period Money Flow Index on QQQ with hysteresis bands to reduce whipsaw. Enters TQQQ when buying pressure dominates (MFI > 60), exits to BIL when selling pressure takes over (MFI < 40), holds current position in the neutral zone.
overfit_notes: Single volume-price indicator at a standard period (14); 60/40 hysteresis bands are common textbook levels for MFI — minimal tuning.

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: Full Ensemble (ultAlgo)
description: Equal-weight ensemble of 19 sub-algos: LeveragedRebalance, RSIDipChampion, TQQQDynamic, ExpandingBreakout, TQQQSMA150, IBSATRStop, MktCapIBSRegime, CMO20, ROC20, UpDay20, TII20, Price126D, TrendStretchExit, AntiMartingale, Donchian200Midline, ROCD200Trail, TQQQPyramid, RangeExpanded, and MFI14Hyst. Sub-algo equities start equal and drift with performance; reset annually.
overfit_notes: Ensemble of independently-designed strategies. No combined parameter tuning.

rules.label: Components
rules.text: LeveragedRebalance, RSIDipChampion, TQQQDynamic, ExpandingBreakout, TQQQSMA150, IBSATRStop, MktCapIBSRegime, CMO20, ROC20, UpDay20, TII20, Price126D, TrendStretchExit, AntiMartingale, Donchian200Midline, ROCD200Trail, TQQQPyramid, RangeExpanded, MFI14Hyst

rules.label: Weighting
rules.text: Equal virtual equity split at start; aggregated proportionally each day
